sql:
WITH matched AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key
  FROM cast_info AS ci
  WHERE ci.id BETWEEN 10001 AND 100000
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM char_name AS cn
WHERE cn.name_pcode_nf = 'M6216'
    AND cn.id IN (SELECT match_key FROM matched);

sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM char_name AS cn
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key
  FROM cast_info AS ci
  WHERE ci.id BETWEEN 100001 AND 1000000
) AS matched ON matched.match_key = cn.id
WHERE cn.name_pcode_nf = 'A4163';

FROM char_name AS cn

WHERE cn.name_pcode_nf = 'A5362';

plan.queryText: WITH matched AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key FROM cast_info AS ci WHERE ci.movie_id BETWEEN 1001 AND 10000 ) SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM char_name AS cn WHERE cn.id IN (SELECT match_key FROM matched);

sql:
WITH matched AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key
  FROM cast_info AS ci
  WHERE ci.movie_id BETWEEN 1001 AND 10000
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM char_name AS cn
WHERE cn.id IN (SELECT match_key FROM matched);

FROM char_name AS cn
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key

) AS matched ON matched.match_key = cn.id
WHERE cn.surname_pcode = 'M6';

  SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key

sql:
WITH matched AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key
  FROM cast_info AS ci
  WHERE ci.person_id BETWEEN 10001 AND 100000
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM char_name AS cn
WHERE cn.id IN (SELECT match_key FROM matched);

sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM char_name AS cn
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key

) AS matched ON matched.match_key = cn.id
WHERE cn.name_pcode_nf = 'M6216';

plan.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM char_name AS cn JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key FROM cast_info AS ci WHERE ci.person_role_id <= 1000 ) AS matched ON matched.match_key = cn.id WHERE cn.surname_pcode = 'S52';

sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM char_name AS cn
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key
  FROM cast_info AS ci
  WHERE ci.person_role_id <= 1000
) AS matched ON matched.match_key = cn.id
WHERE cn.surname_pcode = 'S52';

plan.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM char_name AS cn JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key FROM cast_info AS ci WHERE ci.person_role_id BETWEEN 100001 AND 1000000 ) AS matched ON matched.match_key = cn.id WHERE cn.name_pcode_nf = 'A5362';

sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM char_name AS cn
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ci.person_role_id AS match_key
  FROM cast_info AS ci
  WHERE ci.person_role_id BETWEEN 100001 AND 1000000
) AS matched ON matched.match_key = cn.id
WHERE cn.name_pcode_nf = 'A5362';

FROM char_name AS cn
